title: Shared Web Communication Rendering Seam — say/pose/ooc render parity
summary: Specifies a single shared rendering primitive (CommLine model) so the web terminal and scene workspace both render say/pose/ooc/emit phrasing consistently via --mush-* tokens, replacing PoseCard's diverged implementation. Scoped to rendering only; composer sigil/input routing and server-side scene command changes are explicitly out of scope.
